svg.title: TrustedRouter Combination Models
svg.desc: TrustedRouter branded infographic explaining combination models with a shipping-container analogy, model typology, Synth, advisor models, and stacked pyramid compositions.
svg.text: Token API standard outside. Model orchestration inside.

g.text: Before containers, every load was bespoke.
After containers, ships, ports, trucks, and cranes spoke one shape.
TrustedRouter does that for model orchestration.
Small orchestration blocks snap into bigger models.
Use one, or pack several together as a new model ID.
Build it. Eval it. Sell it. Let others call it privately.
one model ID, one normal API call
complex internals still ship as one normal model
Call published combo models over TrustedRouter E2E.
No operator prompt visibility. No call monitoring.
Design a combo model. Run evals. Offer it for sale.
Users call it over TrustedRouter E2E.
